Value: staggered angled on plate with wasabi and gari, 6pc rice outside
sesame, alcohol, finfish, shellfish, capsaicin, nightshade, mustard, allium (onion, garlic)
Spread sushi rice over nori, on the rough side, from edge to edge in an even thin layer
Flipping the nori over (shiny side up) and spread crab and takuan evenly end to end
Roll tightly together, keeping ingredients evenly spread out and each end filled
Add salmon slices over the top of the roll, apply a sheet of plastic wrap over the fish and roll
Use a makisu (bamboo mat) to shape the maki with a light but firm press
Cut into five equal and straight pieces
Plate each piece angled, with corners lined up, and garnish with ginger and wasabi to side
Garnish the top of the roll with serranos and Miso Honey Vinaigrette
Serve immediately, torch the serranos tableside.
